summary: No installer-harm signals observed in confluent-kafka-javascript@0.0.1
details: Analysis of this package version produced no static indicator and no traced behavioral findings. The tarball does not exhibit lifecycle-script droppers, credential reads, environment scraping, hardcoded attacker network destinations, or other installer-harm patterns. With no concrete evidence of exfiltration, install-time remote code execution, silent-relay, or backdoor mechanisms in this version's content, there is no basis to block or escalate.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
